title: PresenceStatusSetInput::default() produces id:empty-string causing invalid patch key
description: Trigger: caller uses PresenceStatusSetInput::default() (or forgets to set id) and calls presence_status_set. Bad behavior: id defaults to empty string "", so the JMAP update map has key "" which is not a valid JMAP object ID. The server will return notFound or invalidArguments. Default is derived for ergonomics but id has no valid default. Fix: remove the Default derive from PresenceStatusSetInput so callers must supply id explicitly, or make id an Option<&str> and error at call time if None.
